text: Here, surrounded by glass and quiet spaces, I feel anticipation. The sterile environment hums with a potential for collaboration, innovation, or perhaps scrutiny. Stepping into the next room, vibrant colors and thought-provoking text meet me. I read words of confusion and longing, and oddly, I feel mirrored; philosophical reflection washes over me. In these meticulously designed spaces, I am aware of my own presence – at once insignificant and deeply connected to the human drive for meaning and understanding. I sense curiosity, tinged with the vulnerability of being part of an experiment, or an idea in motion.
